title: Marketplace Manager - CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Marketplace Manager in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd!
